spec.precondition: buf == NULL || (valid(buf) && buf was allocated via calloc && forall i in [0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS): (buf->chunks[i] == NULL || valid(buf->chunks[i])))
spec.postcondition: ensures if buf was not NULL: all resources associated with buf are freed, including all non-NULL buf->chunks[i] for i in [0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS), and buf itself is freed and no longer valid; if buf was NULL: no operation performed and no side effects
